---
title: "From AKI to CKD: Role of miRNAs in disease progression"
date: 2025-10-01
author:
  - name: Carneiro-Ramos, Marcela Sorelli
  - name: Neres-Santos, Raquel Silva
  - name: Da Silva, Jéssica Verônica
  - name: Bedin, Beatriz Favero
  - name: Parletta, Aline Cristina
  - name: Honda, Lara Mei
  - name: Junho, Carolina Victoria Cruz
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Life Sciences"
  volume: 378
  doi: "10.1016/j.lfs.2025.123836"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">From AKI to CKD: Role of miRNAs in disease progression</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
